chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-792 OF 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For order on MA No.1801/2025. 2. For order on office objection. 3. Fro order on MA No.1802/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 01.01.2026 Petitioner present in person. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General Sindh. 1. Urgency application granted. 2to4. The petitioner is present in person and submits that he intends to appear before the Executing Court in Execution Application No.02/2023 arising out of Family Suit No. 1107/2021. However, a Non-Bailable Warrant (NBW) has been issued against him by the Executing Court on 16.12.2025. He, therefore, requests suspension/cancellation of the said NBW and undertakes to appear before the Executing Court. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional Advocate General Sindh, who is present in Court in connection with other matters, waives notice of the present petition and states that he has no objection to the request made by the petitioner. In view of the undertaking of the petitioner to appear before the Executing Court, the NBW issued against him is hereby recalled. The petitioner is directed to appear before the Executing Court on 17.01.2026, when the Execution Application is fixed for hearing, failing which the Executing Court is competent to act in accordance with law. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms along with listed application(s). JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
